---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve Lighthouse.
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

Please use a numbered list to describe the steps to reproduce the behavior.

## Expected Behaviour

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.
